title: Canonical story-group definitions
description: Pinned by meta_version.json -> canonical_stories_hash. Each entry is a story key -> {title, patterns: [regex, ...], exclude?: [regex, ...]}. Patterns are searched against the lowercased title+summary+body[:meta.BRIEFING.body_match_chars]; exclude regexes are veto rules.

stories.description: Story key -> definition. Keys are stable identifiers used by every downstream stage; renames invalidate longitudinal comparison.

items.description: Python re.search regex (case-insensitive). Test it before pinning — typos silently never match.

exclude.description: Veto regexes. Match here = item is excluded from the story even if a positive pattern matches.
